auth.heroTitle: Write fast. Let AI keep things organized.
auth.heroDescription: One screen for notes, categories, and lists without extra friction. AI only steps in when it is actually useful.
auth.fastInputDescription: Notes are saved right away, no extra forms.
auth.confidenceDescription: Auto-actions only happen at high confidence.
auth.undoDescription: Any automatic action can be reverted.
auth.loginDescription: Continue working with your notes and categories.
auth.registerDescription: Create a user and get the system category right away.
auth.emailHint: Use your email to sign in or register.
auth.passwordHintLogin: Use the password you created the account with.
auth.passwordHintRegister: Use a password with at least 8 characters.

settings.title: Settings
settings.description: Account, language, theme, and your personal OpenAI API key.
settings.darkThemeDescription: Switch between the light and dark interface themes.
settings.languageDescription: Applies to all screens, buttons, and notifications.
settings.openAiKeyDescription: The key is stored locally in this browser and is only sent for AI requests.

home.noNotesInCategory: There are no notes in this category yet.
home.noListItems: This list is empty. Add the first item.
home.aiAnalyzingDescription: The note stays in view mode. The editor remains separate and is not blocked.
home.aiSuggestionCategory: AI suggests moving the note to the “{{category}}” category.
home.aiSuggestionList: AI suggests adding the note to the “{{list}}” list as “{{item}}”.
home.emptyWorkspace: Pick a note or list in the sidebar, or create a new note with the pencil button.
home.editorCreateDescription: Create a new note in a separate window.
home.editorEditDescription: Changes save automatically while the window stays open.

notifications.missingAiKey: Add OPENAI_API_KEY to backend/.env to enable AI analysis.
notifications.aiMovedCategory: AI automatically moved the note to “{{category}}”
notifications.aiTurnedIntoListItem: AI turned the note into an item in “{{list}}”
notifications.aiSuggestCategory: AI suggests moving the note to “{{category}}”
notifications.aiSuggestList: AI suggests adding the note to “{{list}}”

errors.createListItem: Could not add the list item
errors.updateListItem: Could not update the list item
errors.applySuggestion: Could not apply the AI suggestion
errors.undoAi: Could not undo the AI action
